scope.included: future parent-occurrence and blueprint-activation datasets frozen after this manifest
excluded: all frozen H0-E panels, reports and artifacts
exact-child structure tasks outside parent-occurrence activation

application_order: verify source identity and manifest hash
remove material-level exclusions before enumerating candidate edges
apply path-level quarantine to remaining material-edge pairs
freeze the filtered ordered IDs and candidate counts in the successor Gate protocol

material_exclusion: unphysical near-contact after periodic minimum-image evaluation
space-group assignment unstable across the preregistered tolerance panel
material is explicitly declared outside the bounded parent-occurrence activation domain after a versioned diagnostic
path_quarantine: only particular parent embeddings fail while the material remains eligible for other parent paths

material_exclusions.scope: future parent-occurrence and blueprint-activation datasets only
material_exclusions.reason: The user elected to remove this material from future parent-occurrence activation after all observed SG12-to-SG71 embeddings violated the frozen parent-path strain/certificate domain. The crystallographic source row remains intact for unrelated tasks and historical reproduction.
material_exclusions.source: frozen H0-E-v2/v3 results plus the versioned parent-path localization audit
